# autosaves

**Instance Property**

A Boolean that indicates whether or not the receiver’s attributes are automatically stored in the user defaults database.

## Declaration

```swift
var autosaves: Bool { get set }
```

## Discussion

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the receiver’s attributes are automatically stored, [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] otherwise.

The default value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].
title: autosaves
